requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Equatorial Guinea Fire Authority Requirements and NFPA 855 as the Expected International Reference in Absence of National Fire Code
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——赤道几内亚消防主管机关要求及缺乏国家消防规范情况下NFPA 855作为预期国际参考
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——赤道幾內亞消防主管機關要求及缺乏國家消防規範情況下NFPA 855作為預期國際參考

summary.en: Equatorial Guinea has no confirmed published national fire code specifically governing the installation of stationary BESS as of the dataset date. The country's Hispanophone Central African legal heritage means Spanish-origin building and fire regulations have historically influenced practice, but no confirmed mandatory national fire safety standard for stationary energy storage systems has been identified from official sources. In the absence of a national fire code for BESS, international project developers, EPCs, financiers, and insurers operating in Equatorial Guinea are expected to reference NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) as the de facto international baseline for fire-safety system design and installation. NFPA 855 addresses thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection, ventilation, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances. Project owners and SEGESA should be consulted at the earliest design stage to determine any locally applicable fire-safety authority requirements. The absence of a clearly defined conformity regime for fire safety is itself a key project risk that must be addressed in project risk registers.
summary.zh: 截至本数据集日期，赤道几内亚无经确认发布的专门针对固定式BESS安装的国家消防规范。该国西班牙裔中非洲法律传承意味着西班牙起源的建筑和消防法规历史上对实践产生影响，但从官方来源未识别出任何针对固定式储能系统的经确认强制性国家消防安全标准。在缺乏BESS国家消防规范的情况下，在赤道几内亚运营的国际项目开发商、EPC承包商、融资方和保险公司预计将以NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）作为消防安全系统设计和安装的事实上国际基准。NFPA 855涵盖热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测、通风、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离。项目业主和SEGESA应在设计最早阶段就任何当地适用消防安全主管机关要求进行咨询。缺乏明确界定的消防安全合格评定制度本身是必须在项目风险登记册中加以处理的主要项目风险。
summary.zht: 截至本數據集日期，赤道幾內亞無經確認發布的專門針對固定式BESS安裝的國家消防規範。該國西班牙裔中非洲法律傳承意味著西班牙起源的建築和消防法規歷史上對實踐產生影響，但從官方來源未識別出任何針對固定式儲能系統的經確認強制性國家消防安全標準。在缺乏BESS國家消防規範的情況下，在赤道幾內亞運營的國際項目開發商、EPC承包商、融資方和保險公司預計將以NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）作為消防安全系統設計和安裝的事實上國際基準。NFPA 855涵蓋熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測、通風、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離。項目業主和SEGESA應在設計最早階段就任何當地適用消防安全主管機關要求進行諮詢。缺乏明確界定的消防安全合格評定制度本身是必須在項目風險登記冊中加以處理的主要項目風險。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (de facto international baseline for BESS fire-installation design in Equatorial Guinea in absence of national fire code; formal adoption by Equatorial Guinea authorities unconfirmed — verify directly with project owner and local authorities)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
IEC 62619:2022 — includes thermal-runaway safety requirements at cell and module level (prerequisite for fire-safe system design)
Equatorial Guinea — no confirmed national fire code for stationary BESS as of dataset date; confirm with local fire safety authorities and project owner before design is finalised

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. GB/T 34131-2023 (Technical Specification for Battery Management System of Electrical Energy Storage Station) includes BMS safety provisions relevant to fire prevention. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures under the Fire Protection Law of the People's Republic of China. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised in Equatorial Guinea and do not satisfy the internationally expected NFPA 855 fire-installation design baseline that international project developers and financiers expect. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for project review.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。GB/T 34131-2023（电化学储能电站用电池管理系统技术规范）包含与消防相关的BMS安全规定。中国项目级消防审查由《中华人民共和国消防法》下的地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序在赤道几内亚不被认可，不满足国际项目开发商和融资方预期的NFPA 855消防安装设计国际基准。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在项目审查中补充符合NFPA 855要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。GB/T 34131-2023（電化學儲能電站用電池管理系統技術規範）包含與消防相關的BMS安全規定。中國項目級消防審查由《中華人民共和國消防法》下的地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序在赤道幾內亞不被認可，不滿足國際項目開發商和融資方預期的NFPA 855消防安裝設計國際基準。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在項目審查中補充符合NFPA 855要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34131-2023 — 电化学储能电站用电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specification for Battery Management System of Electrical Energy Storage Station)

gap.en: Critical gap: Equatorial Guinea has no confirmed published national fire code for stationary BESS installations — the absence of a defined conformity regime for fire safety is a primary project risk. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy the internationally expected NFPA 855-aligned design baseline required by international project developers and financiers. Equatorial Guinea's tropical equatorial climate (high ambient temperature and humidity) imposes additional derating and ventilation design requirements beyond China's temperate manufacturing environment baseline. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm with the project owner and local Equatorial Guinea fire safety authorities whether any mandatory national or project-specific fire code applies to stationary BESS installations; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection and ventilation design appropriate for tropical conditions, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) apply derating for Equatorial Guinea's tropical climate per IEC 60721-3 climate class 3K7 or higher in thermal management and fire-risk calculations; (d) engage an internationally experienced fire protection engineer for design review before project commissioning.
gap.zh: 关键差距：赤道几内亚无经确认发布的固定式BESS装置国家消防规范——缺乏明确界定的消防安全合格评定制度是主要项目风险。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足国际项目开发商和融资方要求的符合NFPA 855的国际预期设计基准。赤道几内亚的热带赤道气候（高环境温度和湿度）比中国温带制造环境基准施加额外的降额和通风设计要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）向项目业主及赤道几内亚当地消防安全机关确认是否有任何强制性国家或项目专属消防规范适用于固定式BESS装置；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、适合热带条件的气体探测和通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）在热管理和火灾风险计算中根据IEC 60721-3气候等级3K7或更高等级应用赤道几内亚热带气候降额；（d）在项目调试前聘请具有国际经验的消防工程师进行设计审查。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：赤道幾內亞無經確認發布的固定式BESS裝置國家消防規範——缺乏明確界定的消防安全合格評定制度是主要項目風險。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足國際項目開發商和融資方要求的符合NFPA 855的國際預期設計基準。赤道幾內亞的熱帶赤道氣候（高環境溫度和濕度）比中國溫帶製造環境基準施加額外的降額和通風設計要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）向項目業主及赤道幾內亞當地消防安全機關確認是否有任何強制性國家或項目專屬消防規範適用於固定式BESS裝置；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、適合熱帶條件的氣體探測和通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）在熱管理和火災風險計算中根據IEC 60721-3氣候等級3K7或更高等級應用赤道幾內亞熱帶氣候降額；（d）在項目調試前聘請具有國際經驗的消防工程師進行設計審查。

mandatory_status.target: No confirmed national mandatory fire code for stationary BESS in Equatorial Guinea as of dataset date; NFPA 855 is expected as de facto international reference by project developers and financiers — verify with local fire safety authorities and project owner before design is finalised
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements under the Fire Protection Law of the People's Republic of China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Equatorial Guinea has no confirmed published national fire code for stationary BESS installations as of the dataset date — the absence of a defined fire-safety conformity regime is a primary project risk. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy the NFPA 855-aligned design baseline expected by international project developers and financiers. Equatorial Guinea's tropical equatorial climate requires additional derating and ventilation design beyond China's manufacturing baselines. Engage local Equatorial Guinea fire safety authorities, the project owner, and an internationally experienced fire protection engineer at the earliest design stage to confirm applicable requirements and complete NFPA 855-aligned fire-safety design before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，赤道几内亚无经确认发布的固定式BESS装置国家消防规范——缺乏明确界定的消防安全合格评定制度是主要项目风险。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足国际项目开发商和融资方预期的符合NFPA 855的设计基准。赤道几内亚的热带赤道气候要求在中国制造基准之外额外进行降额和通风设计。应在最早设计阶段与赤道几内亚当地消防安全机关、项目业主及具有国际经验的消防工程师接触，确认适用要求，并在确定系统布局或设备规格前完成符合NFPA 855的消防安全设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，赤道幾內亞無經確認發布的固定式BESS裝置國家消防規範——缺乏明確界定的消防安全合格評定制度是主要項目風險。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足國際項目開發商和融資方預期的符合NFPA 855的設計基準。赤道幾內亞的熱帶赤道氣候要求在中國製造基準之外額外進行降額和通風設計。應在最早設計階段與赤道幾內亞當地消防安全機關、項目業主及具有國際經驗的消防工程師接觸，確認適用要求，並在確定系統布局或設備規格前完成符合NFPA 855的消防安全設計。
